text:
# Apply for a conditional order or judicial separation order: Form D84

Use this form to apply for a conditional order confirming that the court does not see any reason why you cannot divorce or separate.

## Form Content

Case number
Application for a conditional order Name of sole applicant or applicant 1
or (judicial) separation order
Name of applicant 2
Name of respondent
Sole applicants - complete Sections A, C and D
Joint applicants - complete Sections B, C and D
A. Sole applicant Money and property when
you divorce or separate
This section is to be completed by an applicant who made the If you have not already
divorce/dissolution/(judicial) separation application solely. applied for a financial order
you can still do so if you
want to.
1. Full name of sole applicant
You can find more guidance
on financial orders and
First name(s) how to get help agreeing
on any issues at www.gov.
uk/money-property-when-
Middle name(s) relationship-ends/apply-for-
a-financial-order
Last name
2. The sole applicant applies to the judge for a conditional order of
divorce in this case
dissolution in this case
HMCTS USE ONLY
or
in the case of (judicial) separation, the sole applicant applies to the
judge for a
(judicial) separation order in this case
